name: BPFDoor Abnormal Process ID or Lock File Accessed
notes:
Converted from SIGMA Rule.

Original Author: Rafal Piasecki
SIGMA Title: BPFDoor Abnormal Process ID or Lock File Accessed
SIGMA Description: detects BPFDoor .lock and .pid files access in temporary file storage facility

False positives:
- Unlikely

This rule may be covered under the Detection Rule License: https://ibm.biz/SigmaDetectionRuleLicense
conditions_text: when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/run/haldrund.pid%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/run/xinetd.lock%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/run/kdevrund.pid%') AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY BPFDoor Abnormal Process ID or Lock File Accessed on events which are detected by the LOCAL system

AND when the event matches devicetype=11 AND LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%path%' AND (LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/run/haldrund.pid%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/run/xinetd.lock%' OR LOWER(UTF8(payload)) LIKE '%/var/run/kdevrund.pid%') AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: BPFDoor Abnormal Process ID or Lock File Accessed
